goals.goal_text: The student will respond to their name being called by looking toward the speaker.
goals.notes: Use consistent voice volume and distance

goals.goal_text: The student will follow a one-step direction with gestural support (e.g., 'sit down' with pointing).
The student will identify common objects by pointing when named from a field of 4 choices.
The student will follow two-step unrelated directions independently (e.g., 'Get your backpack and sit at the table').
The student will use gestures (e.g., pointing, reaching) to communicate wants and needs.
The student will verbally request preferred items using single words or signs.
The student will use 2-word phrases to express basic needs (e.g., 'want juice', 'more play').
The student will answer 'wh-' questions (who, what, where) about familiar events with 80% accuracy.
The student will initiate conversations with peers across multiple settings (classroom, playground, lunch) using complete sentences.
The student will identify rhyming words from a set of picture cards with gestural prompts.
The student will segment words into syllables by clapping with 75% accuracy.
The student will identify the initial sound in spoken words independently.
The student will blend individual phonemes to form CVC words across reading and writing activities.
The student will point to pictures in a book when named during shared reading.
The student will turn pages in a book during shared reading with hand-over-hand support.
The student will answer simple yes/no questions about a story after it is read aloud.
The student will retell the main events of a story using a picture sequence with minimal prompting.
The student will make predictions about texts based on title and pictures before reading across various genres.
goals.notes: Track accuracy of predictions and variety of genres
